## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Security Checklist

- [ ] No secrets, keys, tokens, passwords, or private data added
- [ ] No hidden network calls or telemetry added
- [ ] No use of eval/exec or unsafe deserialization
- [ ] Dependency changes are justified and minimal
- [ ] I ran local checks/tests relevant to this change

## Risk Assessment

- [ ] Low
- [ ] Medium
- [ ] High

## Additional Notes

Add anything reviewers should verify carefully.
